title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Below Required
scenario: Show limited support pop-up when app version is below required version for a newly released device after its launch date
steps: 1. Ensure a new device is released that the current app version does not support.
2. Verify the current date is after the device's Launch Date.
3. Confirm the installed LM (Lens Mobile) version is lower than the required version.
4. Navigate to the device home screen.
5. Observe the home screen for limited support indication.
expected: The device home screen shows limited support. A pop-up message is displayed: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality."
